---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a detailed bug report to help us improve ParkEasy
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, attach screenshots or console logs.

## 🌍 Environment
- OS: [e.g. Android 14, iOS 17, Windows 11]
- App Version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- Backend Version: [commit hash or release tag]
- Node.js Version: [e.g. v20.x]
- Device: [e.g. OnePlus 12, iPhone 15]

## 📋 Additional Context
Any other context about the problem here.
